channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Iran says it has seized two ships in strait of Hormuz after Trump extends ceasefire
item.description: Iran seized two ships in the Strait of Hormuz after the US extended a ceasefire. Middle East crisis live: Iran says it has seized two ships in strait of Hormuz after Trump extends ceasefire The Guardian.

item.title: 34 Iran Tankers Slip Past US Hormuz Blockade, With Over $900 Million In Oil: Report
item.description: Thirty-four Iran tankers passed the US Hormuz blockade with over $900 million in oil. 34 tankers with links to Iran have transited past the US blockade. 34 Iran Tankers Slip Past US Hormuz Blockade, With Over $900 Million In Oil: Report.

item.title: NFL-Mendoza could anchor Raiders rebuild, Steinberg says
item.description: Mendoza could anchor the Raiders rebuild according to Steinberg. NFL-Mendoza could anchor Raiders rebuild, Steinberg says.

item.title: Trump Vindicated? Iran Crisis Turning US Crude Into World's Safe Bet
item.description: US crude is becoming a safe bet as refiners reroute through the Panama Canal. As Iranbacked forces block the Strait of Hormuz, refiners race to reroute US Gulf crude through the Panama Canal paying historic premiums just to pass through.

item.title: Iran war fuels crisis for Africa's aviation sector
item.description: The Iran war is pushing up jet fuel prices and forcing African airlines to raise ticket prices. The Iran war is pushing up jet fuel prices, forcing African airlines to raise ticket prices, cancel flights and rethink operations to stay financially viable.

item.title: Runners help collapsed competitor at Boston Marathon
item.description: At the Boston Marathon, runners assisted a collapsed competitor. The incident highlighted the camaraderie among participants. Medical help was likely provided promptly. Runners help collapsed competitor at Boston Marathon.

item.title: Iran Guards say 'seized' two ships attempting to cross Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire while maintaining a blockade. Israel and Hezbollah trade fire with talks expected this week, even as more talks are expected in Washington this week after a 10-day ceasefire went into effect last Friday.

item.title: Russia to block Kazakh oil flows on key pipeline supplying Berlin
item.description: Russia will block Kazakh oil flows to a key pipeline supplying Berlin from May 1. Germany confirmed the development, which affects the city's energy needs. Germany has confirmed that Russia will block flows of Kazakh oil to a vital refinery that supplies much of Berlin's energy needs from May 1.

item.title: Iran calls US ship seizure ‘piracy’: Is it?
item.description: Iran labeled the US seizure of one of its ships as "piracy". The US has been seizing Iranian ships in international waters since the start of the war. Since the early days of the war on Iran, the US has been targeting Iranian ships in international waters.

item.title: From paint to planes, Iran war lifts costs, darkens outlooks
item.description: The Iran war has increased costs and darkened economic outlooks. The effects are being felt across various sectors, from paint to planes. From paint to planes, Iran war lifts costs, darkens outlooks.

item.title: Russia to block flow of Kazakh oil to German refinery, Berlin says
item.description: Russia will block Kazakh oil flows to a German refinery. Berlin confirmed the move, which may impact the city's energy supply. The refinery relies on Kazakh oil. Russia to block flow of Kazakh oil to German refinery, Berlin says Iosco County News Herald.

item.title: Holidays 'very likely' at risk as EU warns of 'crisis'
item.description: The EU warned of a "very serious crisis" due to low aviation fuel stocks caused by the war in Iran, potentially disrupting holiday plans this summer. Europe's fuel reserves are dwindling, prompting concerns about travel disruptions.

item.title: EU Considers $106 Billion Loan to Ukraine, Delayed for Months by Orban
item.description: EU ambassadors meet to discuss a $106 billion loan to Ukraine, delayed by Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban's objections. After months of impasse because of objections from Prime Minister Viktor Orban of Hungary, ambassadors were meeting to discuss a key step on the way to disbursing the much-needed money.

item.title: Robinhood's venture fund invests $75 million in OpenAI
item.description: Robinhood's venture fund invested $75 million in OpenAI. The investment aims to support OpenAI's development of artificial intelligence technologies. Robinhood's venture fund invests $75 million in OpenAI.

item.title: SiriusXM to sell YouTube audio ads exclusively in US
item.description: SiriusXM will exclusively sell YouTube audio ads in the US. The partnership allows SiriusXM to expand its advertising offerings. SiriusXM to sell YouTube audio ads exclusively in US.

item.title: EU unblocks €90 billion loan to Ukraine
item.description: The EU unblocked a €90 billion loan to Ukraine after Hungary lifted its objections. Envoys also approved a 20th package of sanctions on Russia over its invasion of Ukraine. Envoys from EU member states have finally paved the way for a €90 billion loan to Ukraine that had long been blocked by Hungary.

item.title: Trump extends ceasefire after request from Pakistan leaders, but Iran strikes ships in Hormuz
item.description: The US ceasefire in the Middle East was extended after a request from Pakistan leaders, but Iran struck ships in the Strait of Hormuz. The ceasefire extension aims to reduce tensions in the region.

item.title: UK bans a generation of children from smoking: How it works
item.description: The UK will raise the legal age to buy tobacco products by one year annually from 2027, effectively banning a generation of children from smoking. This move aims to reduce smoking rates among young people. The law will take effect starting from 2027.

item.title: US Turns To Ukrainian Counter Drone Tech After Iran Attacks: Report
item.description: The Pentagon has increased investments in counter-drone technology following Iran's drone attacks. The US is turning to Ukrainian technology for solutions. This comes as drones play a growing role in modern warfare.

item.title: Iran Fires At 2 Ships In Hormuz Hours After Trump's Ceasefire Announcement
item.description: Iranian forces fired on two ships in the Strait of Hormuz. A Guard gunboat fired without hailing the vessels. The incident occurred hours after a ceasefire announcement. The UKMTO said a Guard gunboat did not hail the ship before firing.
